creator: arved@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Please send updates to ports in diff format. 
Please don't modify the $FreeBSD$ tag. 

I created a diff from your patch: 
http://people.freebsd.org/~arved/stuff/openmq.diff 

To me it looks like NOP. Can you elaborate, what kind of problem you are 
trying to fix?
